001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
005import androidx.room.Entity;
006import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009import java.time.Instant;
010
011@Entity(
012    tableName = "layer",
013    indices = {
014        @Index(value = "project_id"),
015        @Index(value = {"project_id", "layer_order"})
016    },
017    foreignKeys = {
018        @ForeignKey(
019            entity = Project.class,
020            parentColumns = "project_id",
021            childColumns = "project_id",
022            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
023        )
024    }
025)
026public class Layer {
027
028  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
029  @ColumnInfo(name = "layer_id")
030  private long id;
031
032  @ColumnInfo(name = "project_id")
033  private long projectId;
034
035  @NonNull
036  @ColumnInfo(name = "layer_name")
037  private String layerName = "";
038
039  @ColumnInfo(name = "layer_order")
040  private int layerOrder;
041
042  @ColumnInfo(name = "is_visible")
043  private boolean isVisible;
044
045  @ColumnInfo(name = "is_locked")
046  private boolean isLocked;
047
048  @ColumnInfo(name = "opacity")
049  private float opacity;
050
051  @NonNull
052  @ColumnInfo(name = "created_at")
053  private Instant createdAt = Instant.now();
054
055  public long getId() {
056    return id;
057  }
058
059  public void setId(long id) {
060    this.id = id;
061  }
062
063  public long getProjectId() {
064    return projectId;
065  }
066
067  public void setProjectId(long projectId) {
068    this.projectId = projectId;
069  }
070
071  @NonNull
072  public String getLayerName() {
073    return layerName;
074  }
075
076  public void setLayerName(@NonNull String layerName) {
077    this.layerName = layerName;
078  }
079
080  public int getLayerOrder() {
081    return layerOrder;
082  }
083
084  public void setLayerOrder(int layerOrder) {
085    this.layerOrder = layerOrder;
086  }
087
088  public boolean isVisible() {
089    return isVisible;
090  }
091
092  public void setVisible(boolean visible) {
093    isVisible = visible;
094  }
095
096  public boolean isLocked() {
097    return isLocked;
098  }
099
100  public void setLocked(boolean locked) {
101    isLocked = locked;
102  }
103
104  public float getOpacity() {
105    return opacity;
106  }
107
108  public void setOpacity(float opacity) {
109    this.opacity = opacity;
110  }
111
112  @NonNull
113  public Instant getCreatedAt() {
114    return createdAt;
115  }
116
117  public void setCreatedAt(@NonNull Instant createdAt) {
118    this.createdAt = createdAt;
119  }
120}
